changeSet.author: admin
changeSet.comment: Add images and primary_image_url columns to entities
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE packs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS images TEXT;
ALTER TABLE packs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS primary_image_url VARCHAR(500);
ALTER TABLE materiels ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS images TEXT;
ALTER TABLE materiels ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS primary_image_url VARCHAR(500);
ALTER TABLE categories ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS images TEXT;
ALTER TABLE categories ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS primary_image_url VARCHAR(500);

changeSet.author: admin
changeSet.comment: Clean up old product_images table if it exists
changeSet.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS product_images CASCADE;

changeSet.author: admin
changeSet.comment: Ajouter la colonne is_favorite aux tables packs et materiels
